**Clinical Reasoning:**
According to the evidence, while many SSRIs can cause withdrawal symptoms when stopped abruptly, fluoxetine stands out because there's no mention of specific withdrawal symptoms unless it involves gradual titration down during discontinuation. Specifically, fluoxetine has a unique characteristic where it doesn't typically produce withdrawal syndromes even when halted suddenly.
\boxed{\text{B}}
